question: What is the total revenue?
sql:
SELECT SUM(payment_value) AS total_revenue
FROM payments;

question: Top 5 product categories by revenue
sql:
SELECT ct.product_category_name_english AS category,
       SUM(oi.price) AS revenue
FROM order_items oi
JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id
JOIN category_translation ct ON p.product_category_name = ct.product_category_name
GROUP BY ct.product_category_name_english
ORDER BY revenue DESC
LIMIT 5;

question: Average review score by product category, top 10
sql:
SELECT
    ct.product_category_name_english,
    AVG(r.review_score) AS avg_score
FROM
    reviews r
JOIN orders o ON r.order_id = o.order_id
JOIN order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id
JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id
JOIN category_translation ct ON p.product_category_name = ct.product_category_name
GROUP BY
    ct.product_category_name_english
ORDER BY
    avg_score DESC
LIMIT 10;

question: Monthly revenue in 2017
sql:
SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC('month', CAST(orders.order_purchase_timestamp AS TIMESTAMP)) AS month,
    SUM(payments.payment_value) AS revenue
FROM orders
JOIN payments ON orders.order_id = payments.order_id
WHERE EXTRACT(year FROM CAST(orders.order_purchase_timestamp AS TIMESTAMP)) = 2017
GROUP BY month
ORDER BY month;

question: Top 5 states by number of orders
sql:
SELECT c.customer_state AS state, COUNT(*) AS order_count
FROM orders o
JOIN customers c ON o.customer_id = c.customer_id
GROUP BY c.customer_state
ORDER BY order_count DESC
LIMIT 5;

question: Which payment method is most popular?
sql:
SELECT payment_type, COUNT(*) AS payment_count
FROM payments
GROUP BY payment_type
ORDER BY payment_count DESC
LIMIT 1;

question: Top 10 customers by LTV (lifetime value)
sql:
SELECT
    o.customer_id,
    SUM(p.payment_value) AS ltv
FROM
    orders o
JOIN
    payments p
    ON o.order_id = p.order_id
GROUP BY
    o.customer_id
ORDER BY
    ltv DESC
LIMIT 10;
